name: Snapdeal BOBCARD

rewards.displayCategory: Online shopping, grocery, and departmental store spends

exclusions: fuel transactions eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points on online/grocery/dept stores capped at 2,000 RP per statement
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 500 bonus reward points (worth Rs 125) on spending Rs 5,000 or more within first 60 days of card issuance
Snapdeal vouchers worth up to Rs 500 on performing a transaction within first 30 days of issuance
additionalBenefits: Reward points auto-credited as cashback to monthly statement (manual redemption required from July 1, 2025 — minimum 1,000 points)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per month

salaried: Annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 4.8 lakh or more

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.

Reward structure corrected on 2026-06-14: Snapdeal spends earn 20 RP/Rs 100 (5%), online/grocery/dept stores earn 10 RP/Rs 100 (2.5%, capped at 2,000 RP/statement), all other spends earn 4 RP/Rs 100 (1%).
From July 1, 2025, redemption requires manual initiation via BOBCARD portal/app with a minimum of 1,000 reward points.
The card's reward points are modeled as cashback (1 RP = Rs 0.25) because points are auto-credited against the monthly statement.
